query: SELECT id, title, CASE WHEN sheetMusicAbc IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_ABC' ELSE 'NO_ABC' END as sheet_status, CASE WHEN lyrics IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_LYRICS' ELSE 'NO_LYRICS' END as lyrics_status, CASE WHEN audioUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_AUDIO' ELSE 'NO_AUDIO' END as audio_status FROM songs ORDER BY id;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 27tCrNWdmQHZC2L.1303e64f5668 --database Q3oEbCsP6DUj527aoyypq7 --execute SELECT id, title, CASE WHEN sheetMusicAbc IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_ABC' ELSE 'NO_ABC' END as sheet_status, CASE WHEN lyrics IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_LYRICS' ELSE 'NO_LYRICS' END as lyrics_status, CASE WHEN audioUrl IS NOT NULL THEN 'HAS_AUDIO' ELSE 'NO_AUDIO' END as audio_status FROM songs ORDER BY id;
